# SilkQuote

> Professional quote templates, tracking insights, and a collaborative deal room — so reps move fast, leaders stay informed, and nothing slips through the cracks. Free, native Salesforce quoting.

SilkQuote is a native Salesforce application that combines professional quote templates, tracking insights, and a collaborative deal room. Admins build controlled, branded templates with conditional fields and terms. Reps generate professional quotes in one click without leaving Salesforce. Prospects review, ask questions, and sign in a hosted deal room — while leaders track every interaction. All inside Salesforce, at zero cost.

**Key facts:**
- Free: unlimited users, quotes, and templates
- Works with Salesforce Professional Edition and above
- No-code template configurator for admins
- One-click PDF generation from any Opportunity
- Native Salesforce integration (Lightning Experience)
- Hosted deal room with e-signature, Q&A, shared resources, and next steps
- Quote view tracking, open tracking, and acceptance logging
- Invocable from Salesforce Flows for automation
